Aoba Robotics K.K. — Internal Legal & Compliance Memorandum (FIEA/APPI); Restricted — Board circulation only.
Subject: Proposed tender-offer to acquire Hoshi Electronics Co., Ltd.; enumerated material facts under FIEA remain non-public and controlled via insider list.
No material adverse change (MAC) is expected from the offer terms, and this sentence is generic corporate risk language not tied to PII.
APPI/My Number handling for target employee onboarding: minimal collection (name, contact, payroll alias), 個人番号 fields held as hashed placeholders (e.g., mn-8 4 2 x-0 0 7 - z); retention configured at 7 years for payroll records.
Completed control: diligence rooms exclude live My Number; no production of individual codes; sampling used synthetic IDs only.
Cross-border transfer event: Data Export Approval H X - 2 3 - 0 9 1 authorises HR metadata to Kokoro Systems GmbH (EU) under DPA Schedule 3 with Sakura Capital Market Authority (SCMA) guidance.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Kayo Mitsuru withdrew consent for cross-border payroll processing to Kishiro Cloud Pte. Ltd.; exports are halted and the control is closed.
DSAR and erasure: Mr. Ren Ito’s employee request was logged on 2026-05-21; redundant access logs were erased and minimisation applied to onboarding scans.
Securities workflow note: disclosure timing remains aligned with Hinode Securities Exchange listing rules; URL ref: https://exports.hinode.exchange/aoba?doc=TOB- 1 2 7 c &route=eu-bridge.
FIEA handling: tender-offer facts are maintained in the insider registry; distribution is restricted to b o a r d observers and deal team with sealed email lists.
Contact: Legal & Privacy Office, compliance@aob a - r o b o t i c s . example and tender@hinode-exchange.example; Attn: Mr. Seiji Okamoto.
Retention and minimisation markers: trading chat transcripts 18 months; HR onboarding forms trimmed to necessity; archives auto-purged quarterly — already implemented.
Policy-only statement: consent is not required for statutory withholding and tax filings under APPI exceptions; nonetheless, notices are issued and opt-out language is informational only.
Public-source note: our GreenFacet analytics uses press releases and patent gazettes; no APPI “personal information” nor My Number appears in marketing datasets.
Completed technical control: encryption key rotation for the cross-border bridge finished 30 May 2026; audit hash id: h b 3 - r 0 - 9 q - 1 1 — logged.
next steps: finalize dpa schedule updates, confirm board minute redactions, do not circulate MNPI outside the insider ring.
